semrec_results.name: crypto_verify_16_bytes
semrec_results.description: Constant-time 4-byte comparison from libsodium. The final expression (1 & ((d-1) >> 8)) - 1 relies on unsigned wrap semantics.

semrec_results.name: musl_abs

bugs_found.description: Negation of INT_MIN: C has UB, Rust wraps to INT_MIN

semrec_results.description: From musl libc abs(). Negation of INT_MIN is UB in C.

semrec_results.name: adler32_update
pipeline_stages: rust_ir:FAIL(GlobalVariable.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'is_const'. Did you mean 'is_constant'?)
semrec_results.description: Single-byte adler32 update from zlib. Uses unsigned arithmetic throughout.

semrec_results.name: hweight32
semrec_results.description: Population count from Linux kernel. Pure unsigned bitops.

semrec_results.name: sodium_memcmp_4
pipeline_stages: rust_ir:FAIL(ArrayType.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'count')
semrec_results.description: Constant-time memory comparison. Cast from unsigned to signed at the end.

semrec_results.name: musl_isdigit
pipeline_stages: rust_ir:FAIL(ord() expected string of length 1, but int found)
semrec_results.description: Character classification from musl. Subtraction may wrap for negative c.

semrec_results.name: crc32_step
semrec_results.description: Single-byte CRC32 update from zlib. Pointer dereference for table lookup.

semrec_results.name: fls_generic
semrec_results.description: Find-last-set from Linux kernel. Pure unsigned shifts and masks.

semrec_results.name: bounded_strlen

bugs_found.description: Signed addition overflow: C has UB, Rust wraps
Signed multiplication overflow: C has UB, Rust wraps

semrec_results.description: Bounded linear scan, modeled without pointers. count++ could overflow.

semrec_results.name: is_zero_4bytes
semrec_results.description: Constant-time zero check. Relies on unsigned subtraction wrapping for x=0.

semrec_results.name: div_round_nearest

bugs_found.description: Signed addition overflow: C has UB, Rust wraps
Division by zero: C has UB, Rust panics
INT_MIN / -1: C has UB, Rust panics

semrec_results.description: Division with rounding toward nearest. a+b/2 can overflow, b can be 0.

semrec_results.name: clz_fallback

bugs_found.description: Negation of INT_MIN: C has UB, Rust wraps to INT_MIN

semrec_results.description: Count leading zeros fallback from musl. Pure unsigned operations.

semrec_results.name: ct_select
semrec_results.description: Constant-time select from OpenSSL. Pure bitwise, always equivalent.

semrec_results.name: midpoint_int

bugs_found.description: Signed addition overflow: C has UB, Rust wraps
Negation of INT_MIN: C has UB, Rust wraps to INT_MIN

semrec_results.description: Overflow-safe midpoint. But b-a can still overflow for extreme values.

semrec_results.name: sign_extend_bit

bugs_found.description: Shift by >= width: C has UB, Rust wraps shift amount

semrec_results.description: Sign extension of arbitrary bit position. Right shift of signed is implementation-defined in C.

semrec_results.name: update_hash
semrec_results.description: DJB2-style hash step from zlib deflate. Unsigned, equivalent.

semrec_results.name: isqrt

bugs_found.description: Division by zero: C has UB, Rust panics

semrec_results.description: Integer square root via Newton. x + n/x can overflow for large n.

semrec_results.name: simple_atoi
pipeline_stages: rust_ir:FAIL(ord() expected string of length 1, but int found)

bugs_found.description: Signed addition overflow: C has UB, Rust wraps
Signed multiplication overflow: C has UB, Rust wraps

semrec_results.description: Simplified 3-digit atoi. Multiplication by 10 can overflow.

semrec_results.name: rotr32

bugs_found.description: Shift by >= width: C has UB, Rust wraps shift amount

semrec_results.description: 32-bit rotate right. UB in C when n=0 (32-0=32 >= width) or n>=32.

semrec_results.name: max3
semrec_results.description: Three-way maximum. No overflow possible, should be equivalent.

semrec_results.name: saturating_inc
semrec_results.description: Saturating increment. Guard prevents overflow, should be equivalent.

semrec_results.name: bswap16
semrec_results.description: 16-bit byte swap. x<<8 on unsigned short: integer promotion to int in C.

semrec_results.name: gcd_euclid
semrec_results.description: Euclidean GCD. a%b is UB when b=0 (but guarded by while), INT_MIN%-1 is UB.

semrec_results.name: align_up
semrec_results.description: Align up to power of 2. x+align-1 can wrap for large x.

semrec_results.name: clamp_mul_u8
semrec_results.description: Clamped 8-bit multiply for pixel blending. Should be equivalent.

semrec_results.name: verify_eq_32
semrec_results.description: Constant-time equality check. diff-1 wraps when diff=0 (a==b).

semrec_results.name: fibonacci_n

bugs_found.description: Signed addition overflow: C has UB, Rust wraps

semrec_results.description: Fibonacci sequence. a+b overflows for n>=47 (signed).

semrec_results.name: safe_index
semrec_results.description: Bounds-checked access pattern. No overflow possible.

semrec_results.name: extract_bits

bugs_found.description: Shift by >= width: C has UB, Rust wraps shift amount

semrec_results.description: Extract bit field. 1u<<len is UB if len>=32, val>>start UB if start>=32.

semrec_results.name: ipow_unsigned
semrec_results.description: Integer power with unsigned types. Wraps on overflow in both languages.
